description: Let AI agents pay-per-call for any HTTP API via x402 on Base mainnet. One tool: pay_and_call.
name: io.github.AsaiShota/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Funded buyer wallet private key (0x-prefixed). Required for pay_and_call; read-only tools work without it.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base RPC endpoint (Alchemy/QuickNode recommended in production).
environmentVariables.name: BASE_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: 8453 for Base mainnet, 84532 for Base Sepolia.
environmentVariables.name: BASE_CHAIN_ID

environmentVariables.description: Hard cap on per-call cost (USDC). Refuses to pay above this.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_MAX_PRICE

title: x402-market
